author: dexhunter
name: Improved TTT + HedgeMixer: Per-Layer LR Groups + Cosine Schedule
blurb: Improves test-time training on the XSA-all + HedgeMixer backbone with per-layer LR groups (3x for output projections, 0.5x for input), cosine schedule, and reduced block freezing. 3-seed mean 1.1069 BPB on 8xH100 in under 600s eval.
